title: cymophyllus fraseri
intro: Cymophyllus fraseri, also known as Fraser's cypress or cypress, is a type of evergreen shrub or small tree native to North America. The medicinal properties of Cymophyllus fraseri include its essential oils, which have antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of using Cymophyllus fraseri include its ability to aid in respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin irritations. Cymophyllus fraseri is often prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or resin, which can be used topically or inhaled to harness its medicinal properties.
